story.text:
# Station · head+hands

Faculty cube vertex **5** = { head, hands } — the head/heart/hands cube (also soil/soul/society).

**Class:** vision fish · **Role:** strategist maker.

This station appears once in every axis, so there are six of it across the board.
Back to an axis: [[Axis · compute]] · [[Axis · connection]] · [[Axis · delegation]] · [[Axis · protection]] · [[Axis · memory]] · [[Axis · value]]

---
[[Welcome]] · the Game of 42 — six axes × seven stations = 42
